message:
fix(discord,outlook): correct Debug redaction test assertion and add input validation helpers

Discord connector:
- types.rs: Fix IdentifyPayload Debug test that was asserting the raw
  token IS present in debug output — the test was validating the
  opposite of the intended security property. Now correctly asserts
  !contains("secret") and contains("[REDACTED]")
- connector.rs: Fix handshake-before-configure test to actually omit
  zone_dir from the handshake payload. Previously the test supplied a
  valid zone_dir, so it was not testing the rejection path it claimed
  to cover (Discord requires zone_dir for gateway resume-state)

Outlook connector:
- Add normalize_recipients() that trims whitespace from email addresses
  and rejects blank entries, applied to both to and cc arrays in
  send_message(). The required flag controls whether an empty array
  is an error (to) or acceptable (cc)
- Add normalize_top() that rejects 0, caps at 100, and defaults to 25,
  replacing inline .unwrap_or(25).min(100) in list_messages,
  search_messages, and list_events
- Add tests: normalize_top defaults and caps, normalize_top rejects
  zero, send_message rejects blank recipient addresses

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
